title: K-200 Nav/GNC Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-435-D. Revision: D. Type: design-note. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2023-06-16. Last modified: 2024-05-14. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1133, P-1175.
